question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 28, 11PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Counter-Strike: Oxuji Esports vs Falcons Force (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Oxuji Esports and Falcons Force in the Exort Series Main Stage, scheduled for January 27 at 8:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Oxuji Esports" if Oxuji Esports win the match against Falcons Force.

This market will resolve to "Falcons Force" if Falcons Force win the match against Oxuji Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Solana price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the SOL/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/sol-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream SOL/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 29, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will Elon Musk post 0-19 tweets from January 30 to February 6, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from January 30 12:00 PM ET to February 6, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

question: Australian Open Women's: Anna Pushkareva vs Yushan Shao
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Anna Pushkareva and Yushan Shao in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 27 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Pushkareva' if Anna Pushkareva advances against Yushan Shao.

This market will resolve to 'Shao' if Yushan Shao advances against Anna Pushkareva.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 29, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Australian Open Women's: Denisa Zoldakova vs Xinran Sun
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Denisa Zoldakova and Xinran Sun in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 27 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Zoldakova' if Denisa Zoldakova advances against Xinran Sun.

This market will resolve to 'Sun' if Xinran Sun advances against Denisa Zoldakova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 29, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Sushkova vs. Frodin: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Antonina Sushkova and Thea Frodin in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 28 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.

events.title: Australian Open Women's: Antonina Sushkova vs Thea Frodin
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Antonina Sushkova and Thea Frodin in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 27 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Sushkova' if Antonina Sushkova advances against Thea Frodin.

This market will resolve to 'Frodin' if Thea Frodin advances against Antonina Sushkova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Antonina Sushkova and Thea Frodin in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 28 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 23. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."

Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.

question: Spread: RC Strasbourg Alsace (-1.5)
description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game, scheduled for February 8 at 11:15 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "RC Strasbourg Alsace" if RC Strasbourg Alsace win the game by 2 or more goals.

question: Spread: Toulouse FC (-1.5)
description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game, scheduled for February 8 at 11:15 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Toulouse FC" if Toulouse FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: LoL: Team Heretics vs SK Gaming (BO1) - LEC Versus Regular Season
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Team Heretics and SK Gaming in the LEC Versus Regular Season, scheduled for January 31 at 10:45AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Heretics" if Team Heretics win the match against SK Gaming.

This market will resolve to "SK Gaming" if SK Gaming win the match against Team Heretics.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: FC Porto vs. Sporting CP: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Primeira Liga game between FC Porto and Sporting CP, scheduled for February 9 at 3:45 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC Porto and Sporting CP combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".
